full_text:
Sima Zhi (Zihua) 司馬芝 (子華)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sima Zhi (司馬芝), styledZihua (子華), was born in Henei. Wei civil officer who served three generations of the Cao family. Sima Zhi was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
